endpoints.name: POST /apps/licensing/v1/product/{productId}/sku/{skuId}/user
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: GET /apps/licensing/v1/product/{productId}/sku/{skuId}/user/{userId}
endpoints.description: Get a specific user's license by product SKU.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: PUT /apps/licensing/v1/product/{productId}/sku/{skuId}/user/{userId}
endpoints.description: Reassign a user's product SKU with a different SKU in the same product.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /apps/licensing/v1/product/{productId}/sku/{skuId}/user/{userId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: PATCH /apps/licensing/v1/product/{productId}/sku/{skuId}/user/{userId}
endpoints.description: Reassign a user's product SKU with a different SKU in the same product. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: GET /apps/licensing/v1/product/{productId}/sku/{skuId}/users
endpoints.description: List all users assigned licenses for a specific product SKU.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid. Replace {{SKUID}} with a real skuid.

endpoints.name: GET /apps/licensing/v1/product/{productId}/users
endpoints.description: List all users assigned licenses for a specific product SKU.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PRODUCTID}} with a real productid.
